subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, assured leaf! Turn thy gaze toward the Ancient Beauty and remember those bounties and bestowals of the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه توجهی بجمال قدم نما و یاد آن الطاف و عنایات اسم اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
